executives.name: Audra Walsh
executives.background: Ms. Walsh is a professional engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held executive roles at Minas de Aguas Teñidas and Newmont.

executives.name: Bruno Lemelin
executives.background: Mr. Lemelin has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He joined IAMGOLD in 2014 and has held various senior operational roles, including Senior Vice President, Operations and Projects.

executives.name: Christiane Bergevin
executives.background: Ms. Bergevin is a corporate director and former Executive Vice-President, Strategic Partnerships at Desjardins Group. She also served as President of SNC-Lavalin Capital.

executives.name: Kevin Bullock
executives.background: Mr. Bullock is a registered Professional Mining Engineer and CEO of Signal Gold Inc.

executives.name: Kevin O'Kane
executives.background: Mr. O'Kane is a mining executive with over 35 years of experience, including senior roles at BHP Billiton and SSR Mining.

executives.name: Maarten Theunissen
executives.background: Mr. Theunissen is a Chartered Accountant (South Africa) and a Registered Public Accountant (South Africa). He previously served as Vice President, Finance at IAMGOLD and held senior roles at KPMG.

executives.name: Michael Michaud
executives.background: Mr. Michaud has over 30 years of experience in gold exploration and mining. He has been with Wesdome since 2017.

executives.name: Peter O'Hagan
executives.background: Mr. O'Hagan has over 30 years of experience in commodities and structured finance, including roles at Goldman Sachs and Trafigura.

executives.name: Renaud Adams
executives.background: Mr. Adams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining IAMGOLD, he was President and CEO of New Gold Inc. and previously served as President and CEO of Richmont Mines Inc. until its sale to Alamos Gold in 2017.

executives.name: Ronald Halas
executives.background: Mr. Halas is a Professional Engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at IAMGOLD, Kinross Gold, and Vale.

executives.name: Carol Banducci
executives.background: Ms. Banducci was formerly the EVP and CFO of IAMGOLD Corporation. She has extensive experience in financial management and corporate strategy in the mining and manufacturing sectors.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

board_of_directors.background: Ms. Walsh is a professional engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held executive roles at Minas de Aguas Teñidas and Newmont.

board_of_directors.name: Peter O'Hagan

board_of_directors.name: Donald Charter
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Charter is a professional director with extensive experience in the mining industry and capital markets. He has served on numerous public company boards.
